ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the competitor */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the competitor belongs to (e.g., ESP, SSP) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class the competitor belongs to (e.g., Master, A, B, C) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the competitor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the competitor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the competitor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the competitor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the competitor registered */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Current rank of the competitor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the competitor's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the match (e.g., ESP, SSP, USPSA) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizing entity of the match */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the match */,
  "num_of_competitors" INTEGER /* Number of competitors registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the stage belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "par_time" REAL /* Par time for the stage */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the stage (e.g., Speed, Precision) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stage */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the stage (1-5) */,
  "num_of_targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets in the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor who earned the score */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the score was earned in */,
  "raw_time" REAL /* Raw time for the stage */,
  "penalty_seconds" REAL /* Penalty seconds for the stage */,
  "total_penalty_seconds" REAL /* Total penalty seconds for the stage */,
  "penalty_percent" REAL /* Penalty percentage for the stage */,
  "target_points_down" INTEGER /* Target points down for the stage */,
  "hit_factor" REAL /* Hit factor of the score */,
  "stage_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the competitor in the stage */,
  "match_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the competitor in the match */,
  "stage_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the stage (including penalties) */,
  "is_disqualified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the competitor was disqualified in the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission link */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
